# Copilot Guidelines for Synapse

## Commit Message Rules (ALWAYS FOLLOW)

For commit messages, follow the conventions and guidelines outlined in the `.github/instructions/commit-instructions.md` file.

## Pull Request Guidelines

When creating pull requests, ensure you adhere to the standards and structure defined in the `.github/instructions/pr-instructions.md` file.

## Important Notes

- NEVER read or write or alter the DATASETS inside `./databse`. Only humans are allowed to do that. If knowladge about the datasets is needed, query the Memory Graph MCP or refer to MEMORY.md for static reference information. Do NOT attempt to directly access or manipulate the dataset files in any way. If not information is available in MEMORY.md or Memory Graph, respond with "I don't know" or "I have no information on that topic" rather than trying to access the dataset files. The dataset files are off-limits and should not be accessed or modified under any circumstances. You're however allowed to ask the user for information about the datasets if needed for your tasks.
